title: coccinia trilobata
intro: Coccinia trilobata, also known as Ivy gourd or Tindora, is a tropical vine plant native to India and Southeast Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Coccinia trilobata include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and acting as an antacid, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine. Coccinia trilobata can be consumed as a vegetable, used in herbal teas, or prepared as a juice, making it a versatile ingredient in various herbal preparations.
